summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Planora Phase 5 features: WebSocket endpoint, Calendar Sharing CRUD, Reminders API, Task Categories with Filtering, Event Modal Reminder Selector, Mobile Responsiveness. All 20 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/calendar/shares returns shared_by_me and shared_with_me arrays
Backend: POST /api/calendar/share creates new share with view permission
Backend: POST /api/calendar/share creates new share with edit permission
Backend: POST /api/calendar/share returns 400 when sharing with self
Backend: POST /api/calendar/share returns 400 for duplicate share
Backend: DELETE /api/calendar/shares/{share_id} revokes share
Backend: DELETE /api/calendar/shares/{share_id} returns 404 for nonexistent share
Backend: GET /api/calendar/shared/{user_id}/events returns 403 when no share exists
Backend: GET /api/reminders/upcoming returns array of due reminders
Backend: Create event with reminder and verify it appears in upcoming reminders
Backend: Create task with category='health' and verify persistence
Backend: All 5 category types (work, personal, urgent, health, finance) work correctly
Backend: Create event with reminder options (5, 15, 30, 60 minutes)
Backend: Create event without reminder (None)
Backend: Update event reminder
Backend: WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/{session_token} is defined
Backend: GET /api/calendar/shares requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/reminders/upcoming requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/calendar/share requires authentication (401)
Frontend: Login flow works correctly
Frontend: Settings page Calendar Sharing section displays correctly
Frontend: Share email input, permission select, and Share button present
Frontend: Existing share shows in 'Shared by you' list with revoke button
Frontend: Event Modal reminder selector displays all options (None, 5min, 15min, 30min, 1hour)
Frontend: Reminder selection works (clicking option highlights it)
Frontend: Event created with reminder saves successfully
Frontend: Task sidebar category filter bar displays all options (All, Work, Personal, Urgent, Health, Finance)
Frontend: Category filter selection works correctly
Frontend: Sidebar navigation items all present (Dashboard, Availability, Analytics, Share, Settings)
Frontend: Logout button present
Frontend: Mobile viewport (390x844) - sidebar hidden, hamburger menu works
Frontend: Mobile menu opens as sheet/drawer overlay
Frontend: Touch-friendly buttons (Event: 85x32px, Task: 79x32px - both >= 32px height)
seed_data_creation: Existing share with colleague@example.com (share_235642496c76) was used for testing. Test events/tasks created during testing were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 features fully tested and working: 1) WebSocket endpoint at /api/ws/{session_token} - defined on app directly (not api_router), validates session token and closes with 4001 for invalid tokens. 2) Calendar Sharing - Full CRUD: POST /api/calendar/share, GET /api/calendar/shares (returns shared_by_me/shared_with_me), DELETE /api/calendar/shares/{id}. Settings page has Calendar Sharing section with email input, permission select (View/Edit), Share button, and list of shares with revoke buttons. 3) Shared Events API - GET /api/calendar/shared/{user_id}/events returns events when share exists, 403 when no share. SharedCalendarPage at /shared/:userId renders read-only calendar. 4) Reminders API - GET /api/reminders/upcoming returns events with reminder field set and start_time within 1 hour. Event Modal has reminder selector with None/5/15/30/60 options. useReminders hook polls every 60s and shows toast + browser notification. 5) Task Categories - 5 categories (work, personal, urgent, health, finance) with filter bar in TaskSidebar. 6) Mobile Responsiveness - Sidebar becomes sheet/drawer at mobile viewport, touch-friendly buttons (32px height). All APIs are real (no mocks).

websocket_realtime.details: WebSocket endpoint at /api/ws/{session_token} validates session, broadcasts task updates to connected users. useWebSocket hook in frontend with auto-reconnect.

calendar_sharing.details: Full CRUD: POST /api/calendar/share, GET /api/calendar/shares, DELETE /api/calendar/shares/{id}. Settings page has Calendar Sharing section with share form and list of shares with revoke buttons.

shared_events_api.details: GET /api/calendar/shared/{user_id}/events returns events when share exists, 403 when no share. SharedCalendarPage renders read-only calendar with back button.

reminders_api.details: GET /api/reminders/upcoming returns events with reminder set and start_time within 1 hour. Event Modal has reminder selector (None/5/15/30/60). useReminders hook polls and shows notifications.

task_categories_filtering.details: 5 categories (work, personal, urgent, health, finance). TaskSidebar has filter bar with All/Work/Personal/Urgent/Health/Finance pills. Category labels show on task items.

mobile_responsiveness.details: At 390px viewport: sidebar hidden, hamburger menu opens sheet/drawer. Touch-friendly buttons (Event: 85x32px, Task: 79x32px).
